## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Airbyte and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, progress, and next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/Vc-L6B3M2Bhzuij4bdkyvzpoiCJTfdHq?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content production on track: 5 new blog posts published, 2 ready to publish, 7 refreshers nearly complete](https://fathom.video/share/Vc-L6B3M2Bhzuij4bdkyvzpoiCJTfdHq?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)

  - [New non-volume-based pricing is a key differentiator; to be highlighted in content](https://fathom.video/share/Vc-L6B3M2Bhzuij4bdkyvzpoiCJTfdHq?tab=summary&timestamp=587.0)
  - [Macro-level content audit needed; Jacob to review and sync next week](https://fathom.video/share/Vc-L6B3M2Bhzuij4bdkyvzpoiCJTfdHq?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [Content OS to be refreshed with recent updates and suggestions](https://fathom.video/share/Vc-L6B3M2Bhzuij4bdkyvzpoiCJTfdHq?tab=summary&timestamp=873.0)

## Topics
